app.name: Asterism
app.tagline: Organize your GitHub stars into a meaningful constellation.

login.brandSubtitle: Turn hundreds of scattered GitHub stars into a searchable, tagged, and categorized personal knowledge base.
login.connectPrompt: Connect your GitHub account to sync your starred repositories.
login.scopesTitle: We only request read access to:
login.privacyNote: No write access. No private repos. Your data stays on your server.

filters.showingTopResults: Showing the first {{count}} options. Search to see more.

sync.noToken: Your GitHub session expired. Please sign in again to sync.
sync.reconnectDescription: Reconnect to resume syncing your stars.

browse.title: All Repositories
browse.emptyDescription: Sync your GitHub stars to get started. We'll fetch all your starred repos and organize them here.
browse.errorDescription: Something went wrong while loading your repositories.
browse.noResultsDescription: Try adjusting your filters or search keywords.

drawer.title: Repository Details
drawer.noCollections: No collections yet. Create one on the Collections page.
drawer.notesPlaceholder: Write a note about this repository…
drawer.noteSaveError: Couldn't save this note. Your draft is still here.
drawer.tagUpdateError: Couldn't update this tag. The server state was kept.
drawer.collectionUpdateError: Couldn't update this collection. The server state was kept.

readme.notFoundDescription: The repository is in your library, but GitHub did not return a README.
readme.notInLibraryDescription: README workspaces are available only for repositories synchronized in your starred library.
readme.rateLimitedDescription: Reconnect GitHub or open the repository on GitHub to continue.
readme.reconnectDescription: Reconnect GitHub, then try loading this README again.
readme.errorDescription: The request failed temporarily. Your place in Asterism is unchanged.

collections.title: Collections
collections.subtitle: {{total}} collections · Group repos by project or topic
collections.emptyDescription: Group your starred repos by project or topic to find them faster.
collections.deleteDescription: This removes the collection. Your repositories and stars are not affected.
collections.duplicateName: A collection with this name already exists.
collections.saveError: Couldn't save this collection. Your changes are still here; try again or cancel.
collections.deleteError: Couldn't delete this collection. Try again or cancel.

collectionDetail.emptyDescription: Add repositories from the repository inspector on the Browse page.
collectionDetail.notFoundDescription: This collection may have been deleted or you do not have access.

tags.title: Tags
tags.subtitle: {{total}} tags · Organize your starred repositories
tags.emptyDescription: Create tags to label and group your starred repositories.
tags.deleteDescription: This removes the tag from all repositories. Your stars are not affected.
tags.duplicateName: A tag with this name already exists.
tags.saveError: Couldn't save this tag. Your changes are still here; try again or cancel.
tags.deleteError: Couldn't delete this tag. Try again or cancel.

dashboard.title: Insights
dashboard.subtitle: Visual overview of your starred repositories
dashboard.emptyDescription: Sync your GitHub stars to see insights here.
dashboard.errorDescription: Something went wrong while loading your data.

importExport.title: Import / Export
importExport.subtitle: Back up or migrate your tags, collections, and notes
importExport.exportDescription: Choose a format based on what you want to do with the file.
importExport.importDescription: Restore tags, collections, and notes for repositories already synced to this account. This won't add stars or repositories.

formatDescription.json: Complete Asterism backup. Includes repositories, tags, collections, links, and notes, and can be restored later.
formatDescription.csv: Spreadsheet-ready repository list. Includes repository metadata only; it can't be restored to Asterism.
formatDescription.markdown: Readable archive organized by collections and tags, with repository links and notes. It can't be restored to Asterism.

importExport.uploadHint: or drag and drop · Asterism export v1 (.json)
importExport.emptyDescription: Sync your stars first, then export tags, collections, and notes.

export.title: Export selected repositories
export.description: Export the {{count}} selected repositories with their latest tags, collections, and notes. Nothing is changed.
export.error: Couldn't generate the export. Your selection is still here; try again.

formatDescription.json: Recoverable partial backup. Re-importing merges these repositories' tags, collections, links, and notes without deleting anything else.
formatDescription.csv: Spreadsheet-ready list of the selected repositories. Metadata only; it can't be restored to Asterism.
formatDescription.markdown: Readable archive of the selected repositories with their tags, collections, and notes. It can't be restored to Asterism.

bulk.dialogDescription: Confirm a stable scope of {{count}} repositories, then choose tag and collection changes.
bulk.noTags: Create a tag before using bulk organization.
bulk.noCollections: Create a collection before using bulk organization.
bulk.createError: The bulk operation could not be created. Your selection and changes are still here; try again or cancel.
bulk.actionError: The bulk operation could not be updated. Its saved progress is unchanged; try again.
bulk.terminalExplanation: These changes cannot be retried unchanged because a repository or target is no longer owned or available.

aiOrganization.generateError: The draft could not be generated. Your selection and previous draft are unchanged; try again or cancel.
aiOrganization.discardError: The draft could not be discarded. It remains available; try again.

confirmation.title: Final organization changes
confirmation.description: Only these reviewed changes will enter the durable bulk operation.

error.conflict: This draft changed in another tab. Refresh the authoritative draft and review it again.
error.stale: A selected repository or classification is no longer valid. The draft was preserved; adjust or regenerate it.
error.failed: The confirmation transaction failed. The draft and organization data were preserved; try again.

preflight.title: Review what will be sent
preflight.description: Generate organization suggestions for {{count}} selected repositories.
preflight.zero: Select at least one repository before generating.
preflight.overLimit: {{count}} repositories are selected. Keep your selection, but reduce it to {{limit}} or fewer before generating.
preflight.noConnection: Choose and test an active Generation Connection and model in Settings first.
preflight.fieldsTitle: Fields sent to the selected Provider
preflight.repoFields: Repository owner/name, description, primary language, and GitHub topics.
preflight.organizationFields: Your existing tags and collections as stable IDs and display names, plus current memberships.
preflight.notesIncluded: Private notes are included and truncated to {{limit}} Unicode code points per note.
preflight.notesExcluded: Private notes are excluded by your current setting.
preflight.readmeExcluded: README content and credentials are never sent.
preflight.replaceWarning: A saved draft already exists. It will be replaced only after the new Provider response passes validation.

resume.title: AI organization draft ready
resume.description: Resume your saved review choices for {{count}} repositories.

draft.title: AI organization draft
draft.newClassificationsDescription: Approve each new tag or collection independently. Its proposed repository additions remain blocked until approval.
draft.conflict: This draft has newer review choices. The latest version was reloaded; review it before trying again.
draft.reviewError: This review choice could not be saved. The persisted draft is unchanged; try again.
draft.noChangesDescription: The Provider returned a valid empty suggestion set. Your organization remains unchanged.

settings.title: Settings
settings.themeDescription: Choose between system, light, and dark theme.

ai.title: Generation connections
ai.description: Bring your own API key. Keys are encrypted at rest and used only for AI organization.
ai.emptyDescription: Connect an AI provider to enable AI-assisted organization of your library.
ai.saveError: Couldn't save this connection. Your changes are still here; try again or cancel.
ai.deleteDescription: This removes the connection and its stored key. Any preference using it is cleared.
ai.deleteError: Couldn't delete this connection. Try again or cancel.
ai.testError: Couldn't reach this provider. Check the key and model, then try again.
ai.settingsError: Couldn't save your preference. Try again.
ai.lifecycleError: Couldn't change this connection's state. Try again.
ai.modelHint: Locked to the model this connection passed testing with.
ai.modelUntested: Test a connection to set its model
ai.discoveryUnavailable: Model discovery isn't available for this connection. Enter a model ID manually.
ai.manualModelHint: Choose a discovered model or enter a model ID manually.
ai.includeNotesDescription: When on, your private notes are sent to {{provider}} alongside the fields AI organization always uses: each selected repository's owner and name, description, primary language, GitHub topics, and your existing tags and collections.
ai.includeNotesUnavailable: Choose a valid active connection before including private notes.
ai.apiKeyKeep: Leave blank to keep current key
ai.apiKeyHint: Stored encrypted. We never display it again after saving.
ai.testDescription: Send a minimal request to confirm the key and model work.
ai.testValid: Connection is valid and returned the expected format.
ai.testInvalid: The provider rejected the request or returned an unexpected format.

testReasons.blocked: The endpoint was blocked by the instance security policy.
testReasons.format: The provider returned a response that can't be used for organization.
testReasons.network: The provider couldn't be reached or returned an upstream error.
